title: Anthony C Taylor: 'It's About Designing Your Organization So the Architecture Itself Keeps You Honest'
summary: Strategy executor Anthony C Taylor records a podcast conversation with Eric Ries on financial gravity, why governance deserves a seat at the strategy table, and how trust becomes structural capital when built into the architecture.
blockquote: Eric has spent two decades watching it happen. His argument: long-term outcomes trace back to how you design the structure. Principled leaders with aligned teams still drift when the architecture pulls against them. It's not about being perfect. It's about designing your organization so the architecture itself keeps you honest. So misalignment gets caught early, before one bad decision becomes the gravity that pulls everything downward.
attribution_title: Helping mid-market leadership teams execute strategy
